## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Breaking change

## Related issues

Closes #

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused — no unrelated refactors
- [ ] Ran `npm run verify:strict` locally (or at minimum: lint + typecheck + unit tests)
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated for UI changes
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes
- [ ] Docs or changelog updated if needed
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Accessibility considered (keyboard navigation, screen reader)

## Testing notes

Describe exactly how this was validated.

## Breaking changes

If this is a breaking change, describe what breaks and the migration path.
